text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! ☆ This song's so cute! A good love song
always makes my heart soar!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I know! It's so nice! It makes love sound like a
game of strategy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I guess you're right! You won't get anywhere if
you just keep chasing the person you love!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's it! From now on, I'm done chasing. I wanna
be chased!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's go shopping for makeup! I want to
practice for when I'm a proper lady!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Huh? Didn't you say you had training today?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, it's fine! This is all part of my love
strategy. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Mayano Top Gun skips her training...
